Name

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3

Code

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3

DBMS

Snowflake


Check constraint name of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3

Server validation rule of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3

%RULES%


Code preview of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3

drop table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3 cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3
--==============================================================
create or replace table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3 (
RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW_KEY TEXT_255_ not null,
MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY TEXT_255_,
COUNTRY_CODE_BK TEXT_255_ not null,
PRODUCT_CODE_BK TEXT_255_ not null,
TAX_ABSOLUTE_FLAG BOOLEAN,
TAX_CURRENCY_CODE TEXT_255_,
TAX_END_TIME TEXT_255_,
TAX_PRICE_GROUP_CODE TEXT_255_,
TAX_START_TIME TEXT_255_,
TAX_CODE_BK TEXT_255_ not null,
TAX_NAME TEXT_255_,
TAX_VALUE DECIMAL,
USER_GROUP_CODE_BK TEXT_255_ not null,
TAX_ROW_VALUE DECIMAL,
VALID_FROM DATETIME not null,
VALID_TO DATETIME not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG FLAG not null,
constraint PK_RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW primary key (RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW_KEY)
not enforced
);

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3.RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW_KEY is
'PK for RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3.MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY is
'FK to MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3.COUNTRY_CODE_BK is
'Country where the product is available (events_country_code )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3.PRODUCT_CODE_BK is
'Code of the product (events_products_code )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3.TAX_ABSOLUTE_FLAG is
'Tax Absolute (events_products_taxRows_tax_absolute )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3.TAX_CURRENCY_CODE is
'Tax Tax Currency Code (events_products_taxRows_tax_currencyCode )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3.TAX_END_TIME is
'Tax End Time (events_products_taxRows_endTime )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3.TAX_PRICE_GROUP_CODE is
'Tax Price Group Code (events_products_taxRows_priceGroupCode )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3.TAX_START_TIME is
'Tax Start Time (events_products_taxRows_startTime )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3.TAX_CODE_BK is
'Tax Code (events_products_taxRows_tax_code )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3.TAX_NAME is
'Tax Name (EN) (events_products_taxRows_tax_name_en )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3.TAX_VALUE is
'Tax Value (events_products_taxRows_tax_value )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3.USER_GROUP_CODE_BK is
'Tax User Group Code (events_products_taxRows_userGroupCode )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3.TAX_ROW_VALUE is
'Tax Row Value (events_products_taxRows_value )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3.VALID_FROM is
'Hardcoded value ''1900-01-01''';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3.VALID_TO is
'Hardcoded value ''9999-12-31''';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3.ACTIVE_FLAG is
'Hardcoded value ''Y''';

Column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3

Card of the column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3

Name

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW_KEY

Code

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW_KEY

Data Type

TEXT

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3

MD5 Based Composite Hash Key Comprising of

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_TAXROWS_TAX_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_TAXROWS_USERGROUPCODE

Column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3

Name

MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY

Code

MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY

Data Type

TEXT

Mandatory

No


Description of the column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3

LEFT JOIN T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG pc

ON EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE = pc.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE

AND EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE = pc.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE

Detailed logic in attached query

Column VALID_TO of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3

Card of the column VALID_TO of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3

Name

VALID_TO

Code

VALID_TO

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_TO of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3

VALID_TO: Indicates the dattime till when the record is/was valid. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31


Check constraint name of the column VALID_TO of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3

CKC_VALID_TO_RDE_PROD

Column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3

Card of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3

Name

ACTIVE_FLAG

Code

ACTIVE_FLAG

Data Type

BOOLEAN

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3

ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.


Check constraint name of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW3

CKC_ACTIVE_FLAG_RDE_PROD
